message:
fix: daemon backup discovery uses wrong dolt subcommand, add all 6 DBs to config

dolt backup ls does not exist — dolt backup (no args) lists backup remotes.
The auto-discovery fallback was broken (always returned empty), masked by
the explicit databases list in daemon.json. Fixed for when we eventually
remove the hardcoded list.

Also added wyvern, sky, beads_hop to daemon.json backup list and set up
their backup remotes (dolt backup add).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -124,7 +124,7 @@ func (d *Daemon) hasBackupRemote(dataDir, db, backupName string) bool {
 	defer cancel()
 
 	dbDir := dataDir + "/" + db
-	cmd := exec.CommandContext(ctx, "dolt", "backup", "ls")
+	cmd := exec.CommandContext(ctx, "dolt", "backup")
 	cmd.Dir = dbDir
 
 	output, err := cmd.Output()
